title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・キーワード③

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How romantic the rivalries that spur personal
growth, like chestnuts roasting on an open fire!
...What is Gold Ship even talking about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her idioms may be cryptic, but her victory in the
autumn Tenno Sho is clear as day. With a rematch
against Tosen Jordan on the horizon, a new clue
has fallen into Gold Ship's lap. Splendid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night after the race, Gold Ship has a dream
again. In it, a voice calls her a "ship of gold," but
the speaker's identity remains hidden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship realizes Nakayama Festa's voice
sounds surprisingly similar to the one in her
dream. The speaker's identity is slowly coming to
light.
